titleStmt.title: SII 5.640: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 640. (A.R. No. 80 of 1895). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaṉara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ci
ṟantu maṇimuṭi cūṭi viṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Enaimannava ririyaviṭṭiḻitarat tikkaṉaittu
n taṉ cakkara naṭā(ā)tti virasi ṅāsaṉattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakeca
ripanmarāṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade varkku yāṇṭu 4 10 5 Āvatu tiyākaval
livaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaḻupāṭiuṭaiya ma hāde varkku Iravu pakal cantirā
tittaval tirununtāviḷakku Eriyakkaṭavatāka vaittār pūpāvacuntaranāna coḻako
nār teviyār Irājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻaikkūṟṟattuc ciṟṟāmūr ciṟṟāmūru
ṭaiyāṉ perumāṉ kaṟpakamāṉa kaḷappāḷarā jar makaḷ kaṟpakam rājentra coḻiyār yāṇṭu 4 10 5
Āvatu ḷ 2 100 6 10 mutal vaitta tirununtāviḷakku 1 Oṉṟukkum viṭṭa cevari Āṭu 9 10 Ivvāṭu to
ṇṇūṟum tevar paḻayanuntāviḷakkukuṭikaḷil kaikkoṇṭār maṉṟāṭi ciṅkaṉ Aiy
yaṉ viḷakku Araikkālukku koṇṭa Āṭu 10 1 va-m mallaṉ ciṅkam viḷakku Araikkālukku
koṇṭa Āṭu 10 1 va-m tiruvaraṅkaṉ vāykku viḷakku Araikkālukku koṇṭa Āṭu 10 1 va-m periyāṉ toṇṭa
num vempaṉ māṇikkaṉum vempaṉ peṟṟāṉum tevaṉ perāḷaṉum viḷakku Araikkālukku ko
ṇṭa Āṭu 10 1 va-m celvaṉ vayaraṉum celvaṉ Aṭikaḷum māmuṇṭur celvaṉum viḷakku Arai
kkālukku koṇṭa Āṭu 10 1 va-m Aṟavaṇai poṉṉārmeṉiyum Aravaṇai veṇkāṭaṉum viḷakku
Araikkālukku koṇṭa Āṭu 10 1 va-m Aiyāṟaṉuṭaiyāṉ viḷak karaikkālukku koṇṭa Āṭu 10 1
va-m koyil ciṟiyāṉ viḷak karaikkālukku koṇṭa Āṭu [10 1 va-m] Āka viḷakku Oṉṟukku
kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu 9 10 toṇṇūṟum Uṭaiyār tirumaḻuvāṭiuṭaiyār paṇṭārattu ce
ppunāḻiyāl cantirātitaval nāḷoṉṟukku ney Uḻakkāka Aḷakkakkaṭavomāṉom Iy
yaṉaivom Iṉney Uḻakku Aḷavu koṇṭu Erippatānom Uṭaiyār tirumaḻuvāṭi U
ṭaiyār tevarkaṉmikaḷom Itukku yāṇṭu 4 10 6 nāḷ 2 100 mutal Āṭu koṇṭu
viṭṭatu Ittirunontāviḷakku Eṟikka Iṭṭa tarāk kuttiviḷakku Oṉṟiṉāl Uṭkaru U
ṭpaṭa niṟai [100 la] Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 5.640 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
